name: Waldorf Astoria Red Velvet Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening, sugar, and eggs until smooth.
2. Make a paste with the red food coloring and cocoa.
3. Add the paste to the creamed mixture.
4. Gradually add buttermilk, alternating with flour and salt.
5. Stir in vanilla extract.
6. Dissolve baking soda in vinegar (it will foam).
7. Mix into the batter thoroughly.
8. Pour batter into 3 or 4 greased and floured 8-inch cake pans.
9. Bake at 350°F for 24-30 minutes.
Frosting Instructions:
1. Gradually add milk to a mixture of flour, stirring constantly until thick without lumps.
2. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
3. Beat together sugar, butter, and vanilla until fluffy.
4. Mix into the cooled cake batter at high speed until very fluffy and light in texture.
